CustomField.description: Benchmark rent as specified in business plan or management team. This field is not editable by marketing reps and is set by the pricing team at the Aircraft In Campaign level (on Marketing Campaign record)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Assumed baseline rent as specified in business plan or by the management team. This field is set on the lease page (Benchmark Rent) by users with the right level of access and reference here as a read only field.
CustomField.label: Assumed Baseline Rent
